name: rz-ghidra
title: rz-ghidra
summary: ghidra decompiler and sleigh disassembler for rizin
description:
ghidra decompiler and sleigh disassembler for rizin
This is an integration of the Ghidra decompiler and Sleigh Disassembler
for rizin. It is solely based on the decompiler part of Ghidra, which is
written entirely in C++, so Ghidra itself is not required at all and the
plugin can be built self-contained.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use rz-ghidra because ghidra decompiler and sleigh disassembler for rizin.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use rz-ghidra as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair rz-ghidra with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `rz-ghidra --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
